twoFa.enrollSubtitle: Scan the QR with an authenticator app (Aegis, Google Authenticator, 1Password), then enter the first 6-digit code.
twoFa.enrolledBody: From now on, sign-in also requires the 6-digit code. Store the backup codes safely — they let you back in if you lose every device.
twoFa.scanInstructions: Scan the QR with your authenticator app. If you can't, open the manual key below.
twoFa.backupDesc: Save these somewhere safe. Each can be used only once if your authenticator app is unavailable.
twoFa.verifyInstructions: Your authenticator app is now showing the first 6-digit code. Enter it below.
twoFa.disableSubtitle: Disabling requires both your password AND a current 2FA / backup code.

security.emailNotifDetail: New sign-in · password change · contact change
security.idleDetail: After 30 min idle (10 min in finance mode).

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.deactivateDesc: Temporarily signs you out from all devices and stops notifications. Privileges remain.
danger.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate your account? Only an admin can reactivate.
danger.resignDesc: We record your resignation declaration and add it as a mandatory agenda item to the next general meeting. The role ends after the assembly's decision.
danger.resignPrompt: Reason (optional, shown on the agenda item):
danger.resignDone: Resignation recorded; added to the next meeting's agenda.
danger.resignPendingDesc: On the agenda for the {date} meeting.
danger.resignPendingDescNoMeeting: No meeting scheduled yet. Admin will schedule one.
danger.deleteDesc: Available only after you're no longer an active board member. Personal data is anonymized immediately; minutes and financial records remain for 8 years per accounting law.
danger.deleteConfirm: Delete your account? Email and personal data will be wiped immediately.

shell.title: Voting
shell.lede: Online decisions weighted by ownership share. Secret, auditable, court-admissible.

hero.bidNone: I support none of the bids

ballotErrors.submitFailed: Couldn't record your ballot. Please try again.

rules.title: Voting rules
rules.secret: Secret ballot — cast encrypted, results revealed only after close.
rules.weighted: Weighted — every vote scales by ownership share (m² / total m²).
rules.autoClose: After deadline, the result is auto-published and minutes are generated.
rules.pdfMinutes: Every vote closes with a PDF minutes document, valid for court use.

empty.activeBody: No open decision is running. Only the board representative can start a new vote — from a meeting agenda or standalone.
empty.startVoteHint: Use the top-right button to start a new vote

stub.meetingsLede: A Tiles redesign of the existing meetings interface is on the way.

modal.voteSubtitle: Record a new motion. Required majority is enforced per Tht. 2003. évi CXXXIII.
modal.meetingSubtitle: Schedule a new meeting for the building.

meetings.lede: Gatherings, agenda, minutes. One place for the building's decision-making.

resignations.title: Pending board resignations · {n}
resignations.desc: Another board member must acknowledge each. Acknowledging demotes the role to owner, removes all grants, and signs the resigning member out from every device.
resignations.ackConfirm: Acknowledge this resignation? Role reverts to owner, all grants are revoked, and the member is signed out from every device.

proxy.title: Proxy
proxy.lede: Grant a proxy to another owner, or review who's representing you.
proxy.noticeBody: A proxy is full-scope by default — the grantee votes on the entire ownership share unless restricted to a specific decision. Proxies can be revoked anytime, but ballots already cast remain valid.

proxy.incomingEmpty: Nobody has granted you proxy rights right now.
proxy.errorSubmit: Couldn't grant the proxy right now. Try again.
proxy.notOwnerNotice: Only owners can grant a proxy. If you're a tenant, your owner can do this.
proxy.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this proxy?

contractorOnboarding.title: Set up your profile
contractorOnboarding.subtitle: Five short steps. You can come back any time — saved data stays put.
contractorOnboarding.stepProfileSubtitle: What condos see when you bid on a job.
contractorOnboarding.stepSpecialtiesSubtitle: Pick the kinds of jobs you want to be matched with. At least one required.
contractorOnboarding.stepRegionsSubtitle: The marketplace only shows jobs in the areas you mark here.
contractorOnboarding.stepDocumentsSubtitle: At least one liability-insurance and one trade-license document required.
contractorOnboarding.stepReviewSubtitle: Almost done. Verify, accept the terms, and we activate your account.
contractorOnboarding.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: What you're best at. How long you've done it. What makes you friendly to work with.

contractorOnboarding.uploadDrop: Drag a file here or click
contractorOnboarding.uploadFailed: Upload failed right now. Try again.

contractorOnboarding.successTitle: Activated — you're live on the marketplace
contractorOnboarding.successBody: Your profile is live. You can now see open jobs and bid on them.
contractorOnboarding.pendingBody: You've filled in everything, but the tax-id check is still pending. We'll email you once your account is activated.

marketplace.wizardLeadSubhead: Contractors only see this until they win the job.
marketplace.fieldScrubbedTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Locate suspected pipe leak in stairwell
marketplace.fieldScrubbedDescriptionHint: Be specific, but do NOT include the street number, unit number, or owner contact info. The contractor only sees these if they win the bid.

marketplace.privacyHint: These fields are ONLY shared with the contractor who wins the bid.
marketplace.previewSubhead: Exactly what contractors will see on the marketplace.
marketplace.attestationCheckbox: I confirm this listing is legitimate and that I am acting on behalf of the building's board · P2B 2019/1150 · GDPR · DPA v3.1
marketplace.publishError: Publish failed right now. Try again.
marketplace.statusBidsCount: {count, plural, =0 {no bids} one {# bid} other {# bids}}
marketplace.closeConfirmBody: The listing moves to the marketplace archive. Existing bids are not auto-rejected by this action — handle those separately.
marketplace.closeReasonPlaceholder: e.g. The work was handled in-house.
marketplace.boardTitle: Find jobs that match your work
marketplace.boardSubtitle: The marketplace only shows listings where your specialty and region match.
marketplace.boardEmpty: No open listings match your profile yet.
marketplace.boardEmptyHint: Broaden your specialties or regions in Settings to see more listings.
marketplace.loadFailed: Listings couldn't load right now. Try again.
marketplace.detailNotOpen: This listing is no longer accepting bids.
marketplace.bidFormExisting: You can update your bid until the publisher decides.
marketplace.bidFormNew: Fill in the details. You can edit anytime until a decision is made.
marketplace.bidErrorQuota: Free plan caps you at 3 bids per week. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited bids.
marketplace.bidErrorNotOpen: This listing is no longer accepting bids.
marketplace.bidErrorSpecialty: None of your specialties match this listing.
marketplace.bidErrorNotActive: Your account isn't activated yet. Finish onboarding first.
marketplace.bidErrorGeneric: Couldn't submit right now. Try again.
marketplace.medianEmpty: Not enough past jobs in this area yet to show an average.
marketplace.reviewBidCount: {count, plural, =0 {No bids yet} one {# bid} other {# bids}}
marketplace.reviewNoBids: No bids have landed yet. Wait 1-2 days — contractors typically check the marketplace in the evenings and on weekends.
marketplace.reviewAwardedCount: {count, plural, =0 {No completed jobs} one {# completed job} other {# completed jobs}}
marketplace.putToVoteCtaBody: Instead of the board choosing, the general assembly picks the contractor — one vote per unit, weighted by ownership share. The winning bid is awarded automatically when the vote closes.
marketplace.putToVoteTitle: Put bids to an assembly vote
marketplace.putToVoteSubtitle: The received bids are added to the assembly agenda as a point the owners vote on.
marketplace.putToVoteNoMeetings: No upcoming assembly — create one first.
marketplace.putToVoteInfo: When the vote closes, the bid with the most ownership-share is awarded automatically.
marketplace.putToVoteSuccess: The bids were added to the assembly agenda.
marketplace.putToVoteLockedBody: Bids are locked for the duration of the assembly vote.
marketplace.reviewAwardConfirm: Award the job to this contractor? This finalises the listing and emails every bidder (losers get a written reason per the P2B regulation).
marketplace.reviewAwardFailed: Couldn't award right now. Try again.
marketplace.projectsSubtitle: Listings that landed with you. Coordinate timing with the building's board using the contact info we emailed.
marketplace.projectsEmpty: No won jobs yet. Have a look at the marketplace!
marketplace.fitScoreHint: Advisory — rule-based on first-party data, v{version}
marketplace.ratingPromptBody: How did the job go? Your rating helps the next board pick well.
marketplace.messagesEmpty: No messages yet — ask anything before bidding or deciding.
marketplace.messagesAnonymousNote: Messages stay anonymous until decision — you only see the contractor's name if they win.
marketplace.billingSubtitle: Upgrade to lift your marketplace caps.
marketplace.billingUpgradeFree: Free plan — you're on this one
marketplace.billingDowngradeNote: To downgrade, open a support ticket — your plan will revert at the end of the current billing cycle.
marketplace.billingCheckoutFailed: Couldn't start checkout right now. Try again or open a ticket.
marketplace.billingDevOverrideHint: Dev mode: Stripe not configured — the plan activates immediately without payment.
marketplace.errorPlanCap: Too many items for your current plan — upgrade to Pro or Premium.
marketplace.landingHeroSubtitle: Condo buildings publish their maintenance jobs. You just bid — the marketplace surfaces the listings that match you.
marketplace.landingCtaLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
marketplace.landingFeaturesHeading: What you get on the Közös marketplace
marketplace.landingFeature1Body: We only show listings where your specialty and region match. No spam.
marketplace.landingFeature2Body: Boards don't see your name or contact info until you win the bid.
marketplace.landingFeature3Body: Ranking factors are publicly documented — every rejection comes with a written reason.
marketplace.landingFeature4Body: If you're on Pro or Premium and don't win a single job in 8 consecutive months, we refund the fees.
marketplace.landingPricingFreeDesc: Try the marketplace — 3 bids / week, 1 specialty, 1 region.
marketplace.landingPricingProDesc: Unlimited bids, 5+5, document-expiry reminders. The popular choice.
marketplace.landingPricingPremiumDesc: Unlimited everything, featured ranking, API + Billingo + KAM. More work, less admin.
marketplace.landingStep2Body: Only listings that match your specialties + region show up.
marketplace.landingStep3Body: The publisher only sees your name if you win.
marketplace.landingStep4Body: Strong ratings lift you in the Közös AI best-fit ranking.
marketplace.landingFaqQ1: How much does it cost to start?
marketplace.landingFaqA1: The base plan is free, and you get 14 days of Pro automatically when you sign up — no card.
marketplace.landingFaqA2: So publishers decide on technical merit rather than personal connections. All communication stays in the thread until the award.
marketplace.landingFaqA3: Rule-based, version-tagged scoring on first-party data. The active weights + factors are publicly documented.
marketplace.exportDescription: GDPR Article 15 — download everything the marketplace stores about you, as JSON.
marketplace.boardSubLive: Listings here match your specialties + region. Open only.
marketplace.boardResultCount: {count, plural, =0 {No matches} one {# match} other {# matches}}
marketplace.projectActionStartConfirm: The publisher will see that you've started. Continue?
marketplace.projectActionCompleteConfirm: The status will become Done and you'll be asked to upload the invoice. Continue?
marketplace.invoicePaidConfirm: This marks the invoice as paid and closes the project. Continue?
marketplace.projectActionCompleted: Project marked complete — upload the invoice next.
marketplace.projectActionFailed: The action failed. Please try again.
marketplace.projectActionInvalidTransition: That status change isn't allowed right now.
marketplace.invoiceUploadHint: After completing the work, upload your invoice. The publisher pays based on it, and only then can the project reach CLOSED.
marketplace.invoiceErrorFileSize: File must be at most 10 MB.
marketplace.invoiceErrorGeneric: Invoice upload failed. Please try again.

invitation.tenantConsentLabel: I consent to the building retaining and using my email and phone in addition to my name for internal communication (GDPR Art. 6, Tht. § 22(2)). This consent can be withdrawn at any time.
invitation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

invitationManagement.alreadyMember: User is already a member of this building
invitationManagement.pendingExists: A pending invitation already exists for this email

billing.subtitle: Manage your subscription, view plan details, and monitor usage.

billing.legacyDescription: This is a legacy subscription with all features enabled.
billing.frozenBanner: You have {count} buildings over your plan limit. Remove buildings or upgrade to restore full access.
billing.removeOrUpgrade: Remove excess buildings or upgrade your plan.

featureGate.upgradeDescription: This feature is not available on your current plan.

checklist.title: Building setup
checklist.subtitle: A few steps to complete your building's data. This list disappears once everything is done.

buildingOnboarding.title: Set up your building
buildingOnboarding.subtitle: We'll configure your building's data step by step.
buildingOnboarding.saveFailed: Could not save. Please try again.

subtitles.governance: Reserve-fund target, voting majority, and cost-allocation basis.
subtitles.units: Record the units so ownership shares reach 100%.
subtitles.review: Review your settings, then finish setup.

fields.name: Building name
fields.reserveTargetHint: Target balance for the renovation reserve. Editable later.

szmsz.statusDetail: Upload the SZMSZ and the founding deed.

review.note: You can finish skipped steps anytime. Finishing does not lock the app.

buildingOnboarding.doneBody: Your building's basics are configured. You can revise any step later.

headerLine.urgentTickets: {count, plural, =1 {1 urgent task} other {# urgent tasks}}
headerLine.unitsInArrears: {count, plural, =1 {1 unit in arrears} other {# units in arrears}}

memberHeaderLine.newAnnouncements: {count, plural, =1 {1 new announcement} other {# new announcements}}
memberHeaderLine.ownOpenTickets: {count, plural, =1 {1 open ticket} other {# open tickets}}

dashboard.emptyActivity: Nothing new in the last 24 hours.
dashboard.overview: Here is an overview of your building.
dashboard.adminOverview: Building management overview and quick actions.
dashboard.noActiveVotes: No active votes at this time.
dashboard.unreadNotifications: {count, plural, one {# unread notification} other {# unread notifications}}
dashboard.overdueCount: {count, plural, one {# overdue payment} other {# overdue payments}}
dashboard.openComplaints: {count, plural, one {# open complaint} other {# open complaints}}

hero.lede: Voting, finance, maintenance, meetings, complaints, documents — eight modules in one place. More time for the board, less noise for residents, less Excel for finance.

modules.title: Eight modules.
modules.lede: Not just another forum. Eight modules that know each other. A ticket becomes a maintenance job, a vote becomes meeting minutes, a charge becomes a statement.

ann.title: Announcements
ann.body: Targeted notices for one apartment, one floor, or the whole building. With read-receipt reporting.

forum.title: Forum
forum.body: Categorised threaded discussions with moderation. Complaints don't leak into Messenger.

msg.title: Direct messages
msg.body: Direct channel between board and resident. Trackable, exportable.

fin.title: Finance
fin.body: Double-entry bookkeeping, budget vs. actual, bank CSV import. Not Excel, not a side job.

maint.title: Maintenance
maint.body: From ticket to invoice. Contractors, ratings, photos, timestamps.

complaints.title: Complaints
complaints.body: Formal complaint tracking. Mediation flow, automatic escalation to the meeting.

vote.title: Voting
vote.body: Ownership-share weighted ballots, secret voting, live quorum tracking.

docs.title: Documents
docs.body: Bylaws, minutes, contracts — versioned, categorised, access-controlled.

deep.title: Not marketing copy.
deep.lede: 80% of board time goes to: voting, finance, maintenance. Each could be its own product. We bundled them — without cutting corners on any.

voting.title: Ownership share,
voting.body: Votes are weighted by ownership share. Secret-ballot mode produces a hash-receipt without revealing identity. Quorum updates live; closing is automatic.
voting.b2: Proxy assignment per session or proxy term

finance.title: Double-entry,
finance.body: Imported from your bank CSV, split into ledger categories. Budgets are live — see where heating stands vs. plan. One click to a meeting-ready PDF.
finance.b3: CSV import from every HU bank
finance.b4: PDF report for the meeting — one click

maint.title: A burst pipe shouldn't
maint.body: Resident reports with a photo; the system routes to a contractor; the board sees everything. Status, rating, invoice, tracking number — one place.

reports.title: Seven report kinds,
reports.lede: Every report in Hungarian format, compliant with Hungarian law. For meetings, NAIH filings, audits — each one with an integrity hash.

minutes.label: Tht. § 39 compliant
minutes.body: Signature block, resolutions, attendance roll. Once executed = legally binding.

yearEnd.label: Budget + assets
yearEnd.body: Income–expense, assets, plan vs. actual, owner allocation. Draft → approved.

rezsi.label: Tht. § 43/A
rezsi.body: Monthly utility cost breakdown. On the notice-board 45 days — automatic PDF.

audit.label: GDPR § 15 compliant
audit.body: HMAC-signed manifest. Anyone can export their own data anytime.

marketplace.title: Contractors
marketplace.body: Publish a ticket and receive bids from NAV-verified contractors — anonymous request, sealed bidding, auto-notify. The contractor saves on marketing, the building saves on searching.

steps.title: One afternoon.
steps.lede: Most buildings get Közös running in 15 minutes. The hard part is the unit list — import from CSV, parse from your bylaws, or use our template.

s1.title: Create the building
s1.body: Name, address, unit count. 2 minutes. We suggest sensible default categories.

s2.title: Import residents
s2.body: CSV or by hand. The system sends email invites; residents set their own password.

s3.title: Ownership shares
s3.body: Copied from your bylaws. This is the voting weight — editable anytime.

s4.title: Start using it
s4.body: First announcement, vote, charge. We help if you get stuck.

pricing.title: One building.
pricing.lede: 14 days free, then monthly or yearly. No setup fee, no long contract. We migrate you from the old system for free.

trust.title: Hungarian data,
trust.lede: Condo data is sensitive — addresses, finance, votes. Privacy isn't footer text for us; it's daily work. Our Budapest DPO is reachable by phone.

eu.title: EU storage
eu.body: Frankfurt data centre, AES-256, encrypted backups across 3 sites.

law.title: Hungarian law
law.body: Operates under Act CXXXIII of 2003 (condominium law) and GDPR.

audit.title: Audit everywhere
audit.body: Who voted, edited, deleted — timestamped and recoverable.

ownership.title: Your data, your way
ownership.body: Monthly billing, cancel anytime. CSV and PDF export whenever you like.

finalCta.title: Start
finalCta.body: 14 days free. No card required. If it's not for you, cancel in one click.

footer.tagline: Condominium management software for Hungarian buildings. Since 2024.

_legacy_unused_after_2026_05_11_redesign.featuresTitle: Everything You Need to Manage Your Building
_legacy_unused_after_2026_05_11_redesign.featuresSubtitle: From communication to finance, maintenance to voting — we have you covered.

feature.announcementsDesc: Keep residents informed with building-wide announcements. Target specific audiences and track engagement.
feature.financeDesc: Track charges, payments, and budgets. Full double-entry bookkeeping with bank statement imports.
feature.maintenanceDesc: Report issues, assign contractors, and track repairs from submission to completion.
feature.votingDesc: Run weighted votes, manage meeting agendas, and track quorum — all digitally.
feature.documentsDesc: Store and organize building documents with version control and access permissions.
feature.notificationsDesc: Real-time push notifications, email digests, and in-app alerts keep everyone in the loop.

communication.title: Communication Hub
communication.description: Keep your building community connected with a full suite of communication tools. From building-wide announcements to private messaging — everything in one place.
communication.announcementsDesc: Post updates visible to all residents or target specific audiences. Track who has read each announcement.
communication.forumDesc: Threaded discussions organized by categories. Pin important topics and moderate with ease.
communication.messagingDesc: One-on-one and group conversations between residents. Real-time delivery with unread tracking.
communication.complaintsDesc: Submit and track complaints with auto-generated tracking numbers and status workflow.

finance.title: Financial Management
finance.description: Complete double-entry bookkeeping built for condominiums. Track every payment, manage budgets, and generate reports — all with full audit trails.
finance.ledgerDesc: Every transaction recorded with proper debits and credits. Import bank statements via CSV.
finance.chargesDesc: Automated monthly charge tracking per unit. Record payments with one click.
finance.budgetsDesc: Set annual budgets by category and track actual spending against planned amounts.
finance.reportsDesc: Generate PDF reports and export data for your accountant. Full transaction history at your fingertips.

maintenance.title: Maintenance Tracking
maintenance.description: From the moment a resident reports an issue to final verification — every step is tracked. Assign contractors, monitor progress, and maintain a complete service history.
maintenance.ticketsDesc: Residents submit tickets with photos and urgency levels. Auto-generated tracking numbers for every request.
maintenance.contractorsDesc: Maintain a database of trusted contractors. Track job history, costs, and ratings.
maintenance.scheduledDesc: Plan recurring maintenance like annual inspections and elevator servicing with calendar views.
maintenance.trackingDesc: Track tickets through every stage: Submitted, Acknowledged, Assigned, In Progress, Completed, Verified.

voting.title: Voting & Meetings
voting.description: Run secure digital votes with weighted ownership shares. Manage meetings, proxy voting, and secret ballots — all with proper quorum tracking.
voting.weightedDesc: Each vote automatically weighted by unit ownership share. Fair representation guaranteed.
voting.proxyDesc: Residents can delegate their voting rights. Full proxy assignment tracking and verification.
voting.secretDesc: Anonymous voting with cryptographic receipt hashes. Verify your vote was counted without revealing identity.
voting.quorumDesc: Real-time quorum calculation based on attending and proxy ownership shares.

documents.title: Document Center
documents.description: A structured repository for all building documents. From bylaws to contracts, meeting minutes to financial reports — organized, versioned, and access-controlled.
documents.versioningDesc: Upload new versions while keeping full history. Restore any previous version with one click.
documents.categoriesDesc: Tree-structured categories with subcategories. Rules, Contracts, Minutes, Financials, Insurance, and more.
documents.searchDesc: Search across document titles, tags, and content. Find what you need instantly.
documents.accessDesc: Three visibility levels: Public (all residents), Board Only, and Admin Only.

meetings.title: Meeting Management & Minutes
meetings.description: From scheduling to follow-up — run productive meetings with structured agendas, RSVP tracking, live vote results, and rich-text minutes that become part of your building's permanent record.
meetings.agendaDesc: Create numbered agenda items before the meeting. Attendees see what's coming, and minutes link back to each item discussed.
meetings.minutesDesc: Write meeting minutes in Markdown with live preview. Bold, lists, headings — format professionally. Board members edit, everyone reads.
meetings.voteResultsDesc: Votes conducted during the meeting appear with full results — stacked bar charts, pass/fail status, and quorum verification.
meetings.attendeesDesc: See who's attending, who declined, and who sent a proxy — all in real time. RSVP status drives quorum calculation.

management.title: Multi-Building Management
management.description: Manage one building or a hundred. Switch between properties instantly, assign per-building roles, and invite team members with flexible permissions.
management.multiBuildingDesc: Instant context switching between buildings. Each building has its own data, users, and settings.
management.rolesDesc: Users can have different roles in different buildings. Admin in one, resident in another.
management.invitationsDesc: Invite residents and staff via email. Pre-assign roles and units. Configurable invitation expiry.
management.billingDesc: Flexible plans for buildings of any size. Usage tracking, upgrade prompts, and Stripe-powered billing.

_legacy_unused_after_2026_05_11_redesign.rolesSubtitle: Every user sees exactly what they need — no more, no less. From building owners to temporary tenants, each role has tailored access and capabilities.

superAdmin.title: Super Admin
superAdmin.description: Full system control across all buildings. Manages subscriptions, creates buildings, assigns admins. The only role that can grant admin access to others.
superAdmin.capabilities: All buildings, billing, user promotion, system settings

admin.title: Administrator
admin.description: Day-to-day building management. Creates and manages units, invites residents, configures charges, and oversees all building operations.
admin.capabilities: Unit management, user invitations, finance, full data access

boardMember.title: Board Member
boardMember.description: Governance and oversight. Creates votes and meetings, manages announcements, reviews complaints, assigns contractors, and accesses financial reports.
boardMember.capabilities: Voting, announcements, complaint review, financial oversight

resident.title: Resident (Owner)
resident.description: Active participant in building life. Views announcements, votes with ownership-weighted ballots, reports maintenance issues, pays monthly charges, and accesses shared documents.
resident.capabilities: Voting rights, charge payments, maintenance reporting, forum

tenant.title: Tenant
tenant.description: Essential access for renters. Views announcements, reports maintenance issues, participates in forum discussions, and communicates with management — without voting or financial access.

_legacy_unused_after_2026_05_11_redesign.ctaSubtitle: Join property managers who are already simplifying their building management. Start your 14-day free trial today.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. All plans include a free trial.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.subtitle: Complete your subscription setup for the {plan} plan.
checkout.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
checkout.planNotFound: Plan not found. Please go back and select a valid plan.
checkout.checkEmail: Check your email for the setup invitation.
checkout.emailSentTo: We have sent an invitation to {email}. Click the link in the email to set up your admin account and create your first building.
checkout.errorMessage: Something went wrong verifying your payment. Your payment may have been processed — please check your email for a setup invitation. If you do not receive one within 15 minutes, contact support.

import.dropFileHere: Drop file here or click to browse
import.mapColumnsDesc: Map the columns from your file to the required fields. File:
import.previewDesc: Preview the first rows with your column mapping. Verify the data looks correct before importing.
import.importUnitsDesc: Import units from an Excel or CSV file with unit number, floor, size, and ownership share.
import.importChargesDesc: Import monthly charges from an Excel or CSV file with unit number, month, and amount.
import.importUsersDesc: Import residents from an Excel or CSV file with email, name, role, and unit assignment.
import.importAccountsDesc: Import chart of accounts from an Excel or CSV file with account name and type.

registry.descriptionDueSoon: {days} days remain until the 31 October 2026 land registry deadline (Tht. § 55/A–D). Unregistered representatives cannot act on behalf of the building against third parties.
registry.descriptionOverdue: The deadline passed {days} days ago. Representation is legally invalid until registration is filed.

auditCommittee.title: Audit committee required
auditCommittee.description: This building has more than 25 units, so Tht. § 27(3) requires an audit committee. Members must be owners (tulajdonostárs).

arrears.title: Owner names not for public posting
arrears.description: NAIH guidance forbids posting owner names with arrears amounts in public spaces or open noticeboards. This data may only be shared at the general assembly or via sealed delivery.

overrides.title: Building overrides
overrides.intro: Per-feature effective state for this building, with its source. An override beats the plan default, but the global kill-switch and the dependency chain override everything.
overrides.cascadeBody: The grant is ineffective until {deps} is active for this building (currently disabled or not in the plan).

planEditor.title: Plans
planEditor.intro: The checkbox sets whether the plan includes the feature. Enabling a feature auto-checks its prerequisites; disabling is blocked while a dependent feature is active.
planEditor.guardrailTitle: The {plan} plan is inactive but still has {count, plural, one {# active subscription} other {# active subscriptions}}.
planEditor.guardrailBody: No new checkout can start for it; existing subscribers keep it until renewal. All changes are audit-logged.
planEditor.priceWarn: Price changes affect new checkouts only. Existing Stripe subscriptions keep the old price until renewal.
planEditor.blockedTooltip: Can't disable: {blocker} still requires it in this plan.
planEditor.toastBlocked: Disable the dependent feature in this plan first

basic.name: Basic voting
basic.desc: Yes/no/abstain resolutions weighted by ownership share.

weighted.name: Weighted voting
weighted.desc: Voting weight by ownership share; threshold and quorum calculation.

proxy.name: Proxy voting
proxy.desc: A resident can authorize someone else to vote, for a period or a single resolution.

electronic.name: Electronic voting
electronic.desc: Online, deadline-bound electronic resolutions with minutes.

ledger.name: Ledger
ledger.desc: Double-entry bookkeeping, categories, budget vs. actual reporting.

budget.name: Budget
budget.desc: Annual building budget planning and tracking.

bank-csv.name: Bank CSV import
bank-csv.desc: Import transactions from CSV with automatic matching to ledger entries.

bank-sync-live.name: Live bank sync (PSD2)
bank-sync-live.desc: Real-time bank connection via PSD2 API. Billed separately.

pdf-report.name: PDF financial report
pdf-report.desc: Signable, versioned PDF statements for assemblies and legal use.

tickets.name: Issue reporting
tickets.desc: Resident issue reports with photos, status tracking to completion.

kanban.name: Maintenance board
kanban.desc: Kanban view to manage tickets by status.

contractors.name: Contractor management
contractors.desc: Assign contractors, bids, and invoices to tickets.

scheduled.name: Scheduled maintenance
scheduled.desc: Automatic creation of recurring maintenance tasks.

signing.name: Signing
signing.desc: Electronic signing of documents with signature tracking.

announcements.name: Announcements
announcements.desc: Targeted notices to a unit, floor, or building, with read receipts.

messages.name: Messages
messages.desc: Direct messaging between residents and the manager.

complaints.name: Complaints
complaints.desc: Formal complaint intake, status tracking, mediation.

basic.name: Audit log
basic.desc: Logging of every change, building-scoped log view.

export.name: Audit export
export.desc: Full audit-log PDF/CSV export for assemblies and legal use.

multi-building.name: Multi-building
multi-building.desc: Manage several buildings under one subscription with building switching.

api.name: API access
api.desc: Programmatic access to platform data via tokens.

custom-branding.name: Custom branding
custom-branding.desc: Own logo and colors for the agency's clients.

classify.name: AI document classification
classify.desc: Automatic categorization of uploaded documents. Experimental.

comingSoon.title: Coming soon
comingSoon.plans: The plan editor (feature × plan matrix + limits and pricing) is built in the next step.
comingSoon.buildings: The building-level overrides screen is built in the next step.

catalog.title: Features
catalog.intro: Code-owned features and their global switches. The global flag overrides the plan setting; the Kill-switch disables a feature for every building, regardless of plan or override.
catalog.emptyBody: The {module} module is registered in code but has no published features yet.
catalog.flagNotePlan: Inherited by buildings according to plan.
catalog.flagNoteForce: ▲ Overrides the plan setting — on for every building.

kill.label: Global kill-switch · reversible
kill.title: Disable “{name}” for EVERY building?
kill.body: This disables {name} for all buildings — regardless of plan, force-on flag, or building-level override. Services built on this feature also stop.
